original_statement: "Mexico (with its huge home-field advantage) [is a] clear favorite in Group A [at the 2026 FIFA World Cup] according to 100,000 PELE simulations."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group stage qualification
statement_context: Excerpt from comprehensive 100,000-simulation tournament forecast published by Silver Bulletin on 2026-06-03. Co-authored by Nate Silver and Joseph George using the PELE model.
resolution_criteria: Mexico finishes first in Group A in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group stage standings after all group matches conclude on or before 2026-06-26.
source_text_snippet: Mexico (with its huge home-field advantage) and Brazil are clear favorites in Groups A and C, respectively. ... Canada’s Group B is quite weak.
